strategy: He takes +35% from Storm and Death and resists Myth 80%. Hit with Storm or Death.

The fight runs a 5-round cycle. On the second round of each cycle he marks a random wizard with a Stun Shield. The marked wizard MUST damage Ponce by the end of the third round of the cycle to clear it.
If the mark is not cleared, Round 4 he Beguiles the wizard and Round 5 he Sacrifices them (drain plus heals himself 2,090). Always land a hit on Ponce during your marked window.
Melt on Ponce dispels the marking cheat if you want to skip the dance.
Keep Universal and Death blades off yourself when marked (they boost his Sacrifice) and keep a shield up (shields reduce it). Blade up, clear each mark with a Storm or Death hit, and burst him down.
cheatNotes: At the start of each cycle he clears the marks he placed. This is a normal round; use it to set up.
On the second round of the cycle he marks a random wizard with a Stun Shield. That wizard must hit Ponce before the cycle's third round ends.
Melt on Ponce dispels this marking cheat entirely if you would rather not chase it.
The Stun Shield mark does not actually block stuns; it is only the cheat timer.
The third round of the cycle is the marked wizard's last chance to damage Ponce and clear the mark.
If the marked wizard attacks him in time, he removes the mark and their other wards. Just get a hit in.
If the mark is not cleared by then, Round 4 he Beguiles the marked wizard. Do not miss your hit window.
Round 5 he Sacrifices the marked or beguiled wizard, draining them and healing himself 2,090. Clearing the mark avoids all of this.
Universal and Death blades on the marked wizard increase that Sacrifice damage; shed them if you fall behind the mark.
Universal and Death shields on the marked wizard reduce the Sacrifice. Keep a shield up if you might get caught.
Infection does not lessen the damage but cuts his heal from it by half.
